Quantization-aware training in PyTorch 2.5

By Jane Author, March 2026

Quantization-aware training (QAT) simulates int8 inference during training so the model can adjust to the lower-precision regime. PyTorch 2.5 ships an improved torch.ao.quantization workflow that fuses observer placement with module preparation.

Workflow

  1. Define the model in fp32.
  2. Call prepare_qat on the module.
  3. Train as usual; observers track activation statistics.
  4. Convert with convert when training ends.

This reduces inference latency by roughly 2x on supported hardware.


import torch
import torch.ao.quantization as q
model = MyModel()
q.prepare_qat(model, inplace=True)
